purpose: Defines what the local-government data moat can expose as a standalone product surface before economic analysis succeeds.
product_guarantees: Every exported package is official-source classified and has explicit licensing posture.
Every exported package has a data-moat classification even when not economically actionable.
Economic analysis is a downstream consumer, not the only data product use case.
Secondary search evidence is labeled context or secondary research and cannot masquerade as structured primary data.
A customer can query what Affordabot knows about a jurisdiction or policy family without invoking an LLM.
non_goals_for_v0: unreviewed resale of third-party API payloads
